Swiss Bakery & Sweets · Swiss patisserie and Bengali sweets in Minto, NSW

Handcrafted daily · Swiss soul, Bengali heart

European patisserie and traditional Bengali sweets, baked on-site in Minto since day one.

Order Online View Menu
Baked on-site Halal kitchen Open 7 days
Fresh today

House favourites at Swiss Bakery & Sweets

What regulars in Minto order first. Availability rotates through the day — drop by early for the patties, late for the firni.

See full menu →
House favourite

Chicken Patty

Golden flaky pastry filled with seasoned minced chicken and onions. Baked fresh, best served warm.

$3.50 piece
House favourite

Swiss Short Bread (2 pcs)

Buttery, crumbly shortbread baked to a pale gold. Two pieces per pack - pairs perfectly with tea.

$2.20 pack
House favourite

Laddu - 3 varieties

Besan, motichur and coconut laddu - our three-way sampler of India's most-loved sweet.

$23.00 kg
House favourite

Malai Cha - small cup

Rich boiled milk tea with malai cream on top. The perfect pairing for any savoury pastry.

$2.80 cup
House favourite

Rasgulla

Spongy chenna balls in light cardamom-scented sugar syrup. The quintessential Bengali sweet.

$25.00 kg
House favourite

Samosa

Triangular pastry parcels of spiced potato, peas and cumin. Ask for tamarind chutney on the side.

$3.00 piece
House favourite

Rosmalai

Chenna patties in saffron-cardamom-thickened milk, topped with chopped pistachio. Served chilled.

$30.00 kg
House favourite

Firni

Slow-cooked fragrant rice pudding with milk, cardamom and rose. Chilled, creamy - our signature dessert.

$15.00 kg
House favourite

Mughlai Paratha

Hand-layered paratha stuffed with egg, minced meat and onion. A filling Bengali-Mughal classic.

$10.00 piece
Full menu

Swiss Bakery & Sweets menu — baked, boxed, served warm

Everything on the Swiss Bakery & Sweets menu is baked on-site in Minto NSW. Bengali items come with a quick sensory note so newcomers know what to expect.

Savoury Bites Bakery & Breads Traditional Sweets Beverages & Sides

Savoury Bites

Patties, rolls, samosas & more - baked and fried fresh through the day.

18 items
House favourite

Chicken Patty

Golden flaky pastry filled with seasoned minced chicken and onions. Baked fresh, best served warm.

$3.50 piece

Paneer Patty

Crumbled paneer, mild spices and fresh herbs wrapped in our signature buttery short-crust pastry.

$3.50 piece

Beef Patty

Hand-minced beef, black pepper and onion in a flaky golden pastry. Straight-from-the-oven favourite.

$3.50 piece

Tuna Patty

Flaky pastry filled with spiced tuna and herbs. A lighter take on our bestselling patty.

$3.50 piece

Vegetable Patty

Seasoned mixed-veg filling in buttery pastry - the vegetarian patty favourite.

$3.50 piece

Chicken Sandwich

Two slices of soft bread with creamy chicken filling and lettuce. Simple, proper, made fresh.

$6.00 piece

Tuna Sandwich

Tuna mayo with a hint of dill and cracked pepper on soft bread. An easy everyday lunch.

$6.00 piece

Small Burger

Mini beef patty, melted cheese, lettuce and house sauce in a toasted milk bun.

$4.00 piece

Prawn Roll

Hand-rolled pastry with prawns, onion and a light curry spice. Crisp outside, juicy inside.

$4.00 piece

Chicken Roll

Thin bread wrap filled with spiced shredded chicken and fried onion. A Bengali-style street-food classic.

$4.00 piece

Beef Roll

Soft wrap filled with minced beef, green chilli and coriander. Subtly spiced, always warm.

$4.00 piece
House favourite

Samosa

Triangular pastry parcels of spiced potato, peas and cumin. Ask for tamarind chutney on the side.

$3.00 piece

Veg Singara

Bengali-style savoury pastry with spiced potato and cauliflower - smaller and crunchier than a samosa.

$2.80 piece

Liver Singara

Classic Bengali singara with rich chicken-liver filling. A house specialty - the regulars know.

$2.80 piece

Piyaju

Deep-fried lentil and onion fritters with green chilli. Crisp, savoury, perfect with a cup of cha.

$2.00 piece

Dal Puri

Puffed flatbread stuffed with spiced yellow lentils. Soft, golden, great on its own or with curry.

$2.00 piece
House favourite

Mughlai Paratha

Hand-layered paratha stuffed with egg, minced meat and onion. A filling Bengali-Mughal classic.

$10.00 piece

Popcorn Chicken

Bite-size chicken pieces in our seasoned crispy batter. Ask staff for current portion and pricing.

Visit shop piece

Bakery & Breads

Short breads, buns, cream rolls and Bengali pithas from the oven.

10 items
House favourite

Swiss Short Bread (2 pcs)

Buttery, crumbly shortbread baked to a pale gold. Two pieces per pack - pairs perfectly with tea.

$2.20 pack

Salty Cookies · Nimki

Crisp, flaky diamond-cut savoury biscuits with black seeds. A Bengali tea-time essential.

Visit shop pack

Butter Bun

Soft enriched milk bun brushed with butter and lightly glazed. Warm, pillowy, gently sweet.

Visit shop piece

Cream Roll

Flaky pastry horn filled with fresh whipped vanilla cream. A classic European treat.

Visit shop piece

Kaza

Traditional Bengali crisp-fried sweet bread dusted with sugar. Crunchy, light, moreish.

Visit shop piece

Fruit Cake

Rich butter cake studded with glacé fruits, raisins and walnuts. Available by slice or whole - ask staff.

Visit shop piece

Baklava

Layered filo pastry with honey and pistachios. A Middle-Eastern classic, baked on rotation.

Visit shop piece

Patishapta

Thin Bengali crepe rolled around sweet coconut and date-palm jaggery filling. A seasonal specialty.

Visit shop piece

Pakon Pitha

Golden fried rice-flour pastry dipped in jaggery syrup. A winter-festival classic from Bengal.

Visit shop piece

Narikel Puli

Half-moon dumplings filled with sweet grated coconut and jaggery, pan-fried to caramelised gold.

Visit shop piece

Traditional Sweets

Rasgulla, rosmalai, laddu and house-made mishti, by the kilo.

14 items
House favourite

Laddu - 3 varieties

Besan, motichur and coconut laddu - our three-way sampler of India's most-loved sweet.

$23.00 kg

Monsor

Delicate Bengali milk-sweet moulded into soft, lightly sweetened diamonds. Ask about today's flavour.

$30.00 kg

Kodom

Round milk-sweet rolled in khoya and finished with saffron. Named for the kadam flower it resembles.

$32.00 kg

Balu Shai

Flaky fried dough rings soaked in sugar syrup. Crisp edges, soft centre, uniquely layered.

$25.00 kg

Aflaton

Traditional Bangladeshi sweet of slow-cooked milk, sugar and ghee. Rich, fudge-like, nutty finish.

$30.00 kg

Pera

Khoya-based milk fudge, lightly flavoured with cardamom. Smooth, not too sweet, made in small batches.

$35.00 kg

Bondia

Bite-size pearls of gram-flour in sugar syrup, sometimes shaped into laddu. Ask staff for current stock.

Visit shop kg

Halwa - Chana Dal & Hazelnut

Slow-cooked split-chickpea halwa finished with roasted hazelnuts. Earthy, nutty, comfort in a bowl.

$20.00 kg

Chana Mukhi

Bengali paneer-based sweet shaped into soft, syrup-soaked cubes. A richer, denser take on the classic.

$35.00 kg
House favourite

Rasgulla

Spongy chenna balls in light cardamom-scented sugar syrup. The quintessential Bengali sweet.

$25.00 kg

Cham Cham

Oval chenna sweets in thick syrup, often topped with khoya or coconut. Soft, silky, indulgent.

$26.00 kg
House favourite

Rosmalai

Chenna patties in saffron-cardamom-thickened milk, topped with chopped pistachio. Served chilled.

$30.00 kg

Hafsa

House specialty milk-sweet, layered and richly set. A Swiss Bakery signature - try once, order again.

$35.00 kg
House favourite

Firni

Slow-cooked fragrant rice pudding with milk, cardamom and rose. Chilled, creamy - our signature dessert.

$15.00 kg

Beverages & Sides

Malai cha, poro roti and seasonal sides - the perfect pairing.

3 items
House favourite

Malai Cha - small cup

Rich boiled milk tea with malai cream on top. The perfect pairing for any savoury pastry.

$2.80 cup

Poro Roti

Crisp, flaky paper-thin flatbread - torn and eaten with cha. A Bengali tea-time tradition.

Visit shop piece

Buttered Corn

Sweet corn kernels warmed through with butter and a pinch of salt. A simple, satisfying side.

Visit shop cup

Our story

Shopfront photography coming soon - owner-supplied.

About us

Swiss precision, Bengali soul — in Minto

Swiss Bakery brings Swiss-trained patisserie and traditional Bengali sweets to Minto. Every pastry, sweet and bread is baked on-site - flaky patties in the morning, warm singaras in the afternoon, rasgulla and firni set fresh daily. Handcrafted, never shortcut - Swiss soul, Bengali heart.

  • Baked daily

    On-site ovens from dawn

  • Halal kitchen

    Separate meat + veg lines

  • Small batch

    Sweets by the kilo, fresh

  • Catering ready

    Trays, boxes, large orders

Find us

Visit Swiss Bakery & Sweets in Minto, NSW

Shop 3/12 Minto Rd — five minutes from Minto station. Parking out front. Walk-ins welcome; phone ahead for large orders, catering trays and custom sweets at Swiss Bakery & Sweets.

Address
Shop 3/12 Minto Rd, Minto NSW 2566
Phone
+61 0452 626 232
Email
contact@swissbakery.com.au
Hours
Tue–Sun 8:00 am – 8:00 pm · Mon closed
Order Online Call shop Open in Maps ↗

Handcrafted pastries and traditional Bengali sweets — baked on-site in Minto. Walk-ins, phone orders and catering trays all welcome.
